author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented full Transformer module suite: TransformerEncoderLayer (self-attn + FFN + LayerNorm + Dropout), TransformerDecoderLayer (self-attn + cross-attn + FFN), TransformerEncoder (N-layer stack), TransformerDecoder (N-layer stack), Transformer (encoder-decoder). Also added RoPE, SwiGLU, KVCache. All exported from ferrotorch-nn. 3445 tests pass.
